mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_KANBAN_BOARD (BOARD_ID, PN, BOARD_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{pn}, #{boardName}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO TB_KANBAN_COLUMN(COLUMN_ID, BOARD_ID, COLUMN_NAME, ORDER_NUM, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES( seq_kanban_column.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{columnName}, #{orderNum}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
